title: Shenzhen, Guangdong — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Shenzhen, Guangdong: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Shenzhen is a city in Guangdong with a population of 17,560,000. China’s tech innovation hub and Silicon Valley equivalent, home to Huawei and Tencent, with a subtropical climate and modern urban planning.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
